## External Integrations (1)

External integrations that connect Tines with TheHive:

### TheHive Project Connector
Native Tines credential connector that enables workflows to interact with TheHive for automated incident creation, updates, and case management

- **Type:** connector
- **Documentation:** [https://www.tines.com/solutions/products/thehive-project/](https://www.tines.com/solutions/products/thehive-project/)
